sourceRef: tip:A short script for dropping students in Enrollment Manager

slides.headline: Script for dropping students in EM
slides.body: Easily manage student drops in your Enrollment Manager with our step-by-step guide.

slides.headline: Initiate the drop
slides.body: Open the Student Management module in your Enrollment Manager.

slides.headline: Review details
slides.body: Verify the student’s name, enrollment status, and any pending requirements.

slides.headline: Select drop reason
slides.body: Choose the appropriate reason from the drop reason dropdown menu.

slides.headline: Sign-off
slides.body: Sign off on the drop action by entering your initials or signature.

slides.headline: Submit and review
slides.body: Submit the drop action and review the confirmation message.
Master this process with our complete guide. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Easily manage student drops in your Enrollment Manager with our step-by-step guide. Streamline your workflow and ensure accurate records with our detailed script. Link in bio for the full guide.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more engaging headline to draw attention. The top fix would be to add a small icon or graphic next to the headline to enhance visual interest.
